questions: AI diye article summarize kora jay?
answers: Text summarization is an NLP task that condenses long text into a shorter version while keeping key information. It can be extractive (selecting important sentences) or abstractive (rewriting in new words).
AI summarization holo boro text ke choto kora key information reke. LLMs like GPT ar Claude onek valo summarize korte pare — articles, papers, meetings shob.

Extractive summarization picks the most important sentences from the original text. Abstractive summarization generates new sentences that capture the essence, which is more natural but harder to do well.

Summarization is used for news digests, research paper summaries, meeting notes, legal document analysis, and content curation. Tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and specialized models handle it effectively.
